name: skrapa
author: iambriansreed

scripts.dev-pack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm pack && rm -f ../skrapa-*.tgz && mv skrapa-*.tgz ../ && cd .. && rm -rf package && tar -xzf skrapa-*.tgz && cd package && npm link
scripts.release: npm run build & npm version patch && npm publish

description: Build static sites with TypeScript JSX templates and TypeScript client-side code — no framework, no virtual DOM, no bundler config.
